title: Mrs. Bland internship + YES Kennedy-Lugar paperwork (2019)
html:
Mrs. Bland internship + YES Kennedy-Lugar paperwork (2019)

Source: 2019-10-29 Apple Note. HS senior-year todo dump capturing the Kennedy-Lugar YES Abroad scholarship application push (the study abroad precursor) and the Bland internship lead.

TL;DR

  • YES Kennedy-Lugar Abroad scholarship application sprint — scan transcripts, take photos, scan signed agreement, write essay to host family — captured under the URGENT** prefix. This is the failed-but-formative application that prefigures the eventually-realized China chapter in 2024.
  • Mrs. Bland internship lead — early Silicon Valley pipe dream that recurs in 2021 04 Ford questions note as "Bland Silicon Valley internship." Bland appears to be a teacher/mentor figure at Grants Pass HS.
  • Scott Carnes — Coding Zeal: first capture of the local-Oregon coding bootcamp founder Yahir was orbiting before OSU CS pivot.
  • Chinese cards and recordings — flashcard-grind era; six years before the actual China immersion in 2024.
  • Reads as the precursor map of three later threads: study-abroad-China, software-career, and mentorship-network — all visible as seeds in one mundane HS todo list.

Connections

  • shanghai study abroad — the eventual realized version
  • china chapter
  • grants pass teen era
  • fbla
  • ford family foundation — adjacent scholarship channel
  • 2021 04 10 ford questions — Bland mention recurs

related.label: School — FBLA, YES, internship, SAT four-pillar todo
